summary:
Per-request DataLoaders now come from the shared GraphQL context, so resolver calls batch correctly instead of issuing N+1 queries.

- `src/context.ts:3` imports `createLoaders` and the context factory returns `{ db, loaders }`, extending `GqlContext` so every request shares one loader set.
- `src/resolvers/userResolver.ts:16` routes single-user lookups through `ctx.loaders.userLoader`, and `src/resolvers/userResolver.ts:25` batches userâ†’posts resolution via `postsByAuthorLoader`.
- `src/resolvers/postResolver.ts:56` reuses the shared `userLoader` for postâ†’author resolution, eliminating per-call DataLoader instantiation.

Tests: `./test.sh` (passes).
